quality.rationale: 基于嵌入曲面诱导度规进行多步张量计算，逻辑链条完整且结构高度可泛化至其他二维流形

origin.question: Problem 9.6. Set up a coordinate system on a torus (the 2-dimensional surface of a doughnut in Euclidean 3-space). Calculate all components of $\mathbf{g}_{\mu \nu}$ , $\Gamma_{\alpha \beta}^{\mu}$ and $\mathbb{R}_{\alpha \beta \gamma \delta}$ .
origin.answer: $g_{\\phi \\phi} = a^2$, $g_{\\theta \\theta} = (b + a \\sin \\phi)^2$, $\\Gamma_{\\theta \\theta}^{\\phi} = - a^{-1} (b + a \\sin \\phi) \\cos \\phi$, $\\Gamma_{\\theta \\phi}^{\\theta} = a \\cos \\phi (b + a \\sin \\phi)^{-1}$, $R_{\\phi \\theta \\phi \\theta} = a \\sin \\phi (b + a \\sin \\phi)$
origin.solution:
Solution 9.6. From the diagram, two orthogonal infinitesimal displacements have length $\mathrm{ad}\phi$ and $(\mathbf{b} + \mathbf{a}\sin \phi)\mathrm{d}	heta$ so $\mathrm{ds}^2 = \mathbf{a}^2\mathrm{d}\phi^2 +$
$(\mathbf{b} + \mathbf{a}\sin \phi)^2\mathrm{d}	heta^2$ or $\mathbf{g}_{	heta 	heta} = (\mathbf{b} + \mathbf{a}\sin \phi)^2$ $\mathbf{g}_{\phi \phi} = \mathbf{a}^2$ $\mathbf{g}_{	heta \phi} = \mathbf{g}_{\phi 	heta} = 0$ . The formula for the Christoffel symbols now gives the nonvanishing $\Gamma$ 's
directly
$$
\Gamma_{\theta \theta}^{\phi} = - a^{- 1} (b + a \sin \phi) \cos \phi
$$
$$
\Gamma_{\theta \phi}^{\theta} = \Gamma_{\phi \theta}^{\theta} = a \cos \phi (b + a \sin \phi)^{- 1}.
$$
![](images/676f10c7ed81633b56d68b980dfc5915d9f8b6a0ac296e4acc85b928efbe5b75.jpg)
![](images/a67afcc6a191ddbce0aba94b949cd380a227f47b8c5de22a42321784b58db37d.jpg)
In 2 dimensions the Riemann tensor has only one independent component. Take it to be $\mathbf{R}_{\phi \theta \phi \theta}$ , then the standard formula gives
$$
R_{\phi \theta \phi \theta} = a \sin \phi (b + a \sin \phi).
$$
